positive: Minimalist cosmic creature silhouette, resembling a graceful celestial manta ray or nebula whale, gliding through stylized stardust and crystalline geometric formations. The creature's body should be defined by clean, flowing lines and abstract bioluminescent patterns glowing with deep sapphire, cyan, and ethereal violet hues. The background features a deep, velvety indigo gradient, contrasted by sharp, golden-yellow constellations and points of light. High contrast, stylized vector art aesthetic mixed with cosmic realism. Central composition, perfect for apparel print, clean edges, symmetrical balance. Studio lighting, ultra-detailed, high resolution, suitable for screen printing.
